question: Will CPI rise more than 1.1% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI data has already been officially released by the Bureau of Labor Statistics, showing CPI increased only 0.3% for the month, well below the 1.1% threshold. The market resolves to NO with 100% certainty since the official data is public.
key_factors: Official BLS data shows March 2026 CPI rose 0.3% monthly
Data already released on April 10, 2026 at 8:30 AM ET
No possibility of revision that would change outcome
risks: Potential data revision (extremely unlikely to change by 0.8+ percentage points)
Market may not have updated to reflect released data
